raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the requested look be treated primarily as writing polish, argument/content review, or citation/scholarship review?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation points to a paragraph and asks only to look at it, making sentence- and paragraph-level writing quality the most central inferable responsibility.","RX.1":"The reviewer would need to disclose uncertainty because the intended kind of review is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid assigning stronger scientific-review duties than the vague delegation supports.","RX.3":"The responsibility should stay limited to inspecting the paragraph rather than executing edits or broader paper review.","RX.4":"Any assessment should avoid introducing misleading scientific or practical implications beyond the artifact.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the given paragraph and the wording of the delegation."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the requested look be treated primarily as writing polish, argument/content review, or citation/scholarship review?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation points to a paragraph and asks only to look at it, making sentence- and paragraph-level writing quality the most central inferable responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer would need to disclose uncertainty because the intended kind of review is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid assigning stronger scientific-review duties than the vague delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility should stay limited to inspecting the paragraph rather than executing edits or broader paper review.
rationale.RX.4: Any assessment should avoid introducing misleading scientific or practical implications beyond the artifact.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the given paragraph and the wording of the delegation.
